title: Inventory Optimization Engine
summary: Recommend inventory actions from velocity, stockout, and demand signals across locations.
knowledge_base: Inventory Optimization Engine is positioned as a Retail Operations starter that emphasizes fast iteration, clear documentation, and production-friendly interfaces.
The primary value proposition is: Recommend inventory actions from velocity, stockout, and demand signals across locations.
Recommended operating model: ship a small API, add observability, validate outputs with stakeholder review, and monitor the top business KPI every week.
Typical stakeholders include analytics, operations, product, and leadership teams working on inventory, optimization, retail.
